evidenceClaim: 144-trial babel relay through the same Cursor wrapper gate, model swapped to gpt-5.4-nano-low: warn detects 24/24 drifted relays but 10 ship anyway; enforce halts 25/25. Heavy caveat: 47 hop failures and 20 malformed audits thin the denominators.
deviations: Enforcement is wrapper-level (sema check runs before cursor-agent is invoked); cursor hook dispatch is server-gated off on this account, so the in-harness hook tier could not be tested
The warn channel is prompt-prepension of the repair text, not hook-stdout context injection
Frozen boundary prompts delivered via per-trial AGENTS.md plus the same inline-artifacts harness note as codex-hook
Registry rebuilt from scenarios.yaml with sema's mint pipeline; all six stubs verified byte-identical to the frozen babel-hook stubs.json before the run
Data quality: 47/144 trials hit hop timeouts (both 300s attempts) and 20 audit replies were malformed; nano's per-arm denominators are thinned accordingly
